seo.title: About BSW TECH — ISO 27001 & 9001 Certified Embedded Engineering | Moldova
seo.description: Bessarabia Software Technology (BSW TECH) — Moldova's Automotive & IoT engineering company. ISO 27001, ISO 9001, ISO 14001 certified. 30+ engineers.
seo.keywords: About BSW TECH, near-shore Moldova, embedded engineering, AUTOSAR, IoT, ISO 9001, ISO 27001, ISO 14001

hero.title: About BSW TECH
hero.subtitle: A European engineering company delivering embedded and software solutions for Automotive, IoT, and Product Design sectors.

overview.title: Engineering Partner You Can Trust
paragraphs: BSW TECH SRL is a European engineering company from Moldova delivering embedded and software solutions for Automotive, IoT and Product Design sectors.
We combine hardware design, firmware development, and software engineering under one roof, enabling us to deliver complete product solutions from concept to production.
Since 2021, we've been helping Nordic and German companies accelerate their R&D capacity with cost-efficient near-shore engineering that doesn't compromise on quality.

team.title: Our Team
team.subtitle: 30+ engineers led by experienced leaders across embedded, automotive, and IoT.
team.ceoQuote: Technology knows no borders — and neither do we.
team.ceoDescription: In a world where speed defines success, nearshoring with BSW TECH turns distance into advantage — accelerating innovation, reducing costs, and transforming bold ideas into real products.

members.name: Igor R.
members.focus: Firmware architecture in C/C++, AUTOSAR Classic integration, and real-time embedded systems for automotive and IoT products.

members.name: Daniel V.
members.focus: Machine learning pipelines, computer vision, and AI-driven automation for industrial and IoT applications.

members.name: Grigorie C.
members.focus: Scalable backend architectures, database design, and high-performance API development for connected systems.

members.name: Vlad M.
members.focus: Multi-layer PCB design, schematic capture, and DFM-optimized hardware from prototype to production.
